title: Using AI to outsmart drug-resistant bacteria
summary: Google DeepMind researchers at Cambridge use AlphaFold, Gemini, and Co-Scientist to analyze bacterial resistance mechanisms in structural biology, compressing analysis time from years to minutes. The work addresses antimicrobial resistance by accelerating discovery of drug targets against evolving pathogens.
